task_text: Which accounts are managed by Graf Thomas? Return only the account names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

Find linked accounts managed by that manager

Locate Graf/Thomas manager file by fields
Read accounts to match manager identifier

next_step.observation: contacts/README.MD defines person records with account_id and stable id, but no explicit manager relation rules.

next_step.current_state: Found likely canonical person as Thomas Graf in manager record. Need its identifier and then map to accounts via structured field.
next_step.observation: Search in /contacts found one match: contacts/mgr_002.json contains full_name "Thomas Graf".

next_step.current_state: Canonical record resolved: target is Thomas Graf with id mgr_002. Need account linkage field schema to identify managed accounts precisely.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read all matching account files for account names
next_step.observation: contacts/mgr_002.json identifies Thomas Graf as id mgr_002 and role Account Manager.

next_step.current_state: Accounts schema shows manager field likely stored as name; still need concrete matches in account files. Ignore unrelated reactive security context because no inbox content was read.

plan_remaining_steps_brief: Extract account names and sort alphabetically
next_step.observation: Search in /accounts for identifier "mgr_002" returned zero matches.

next_step.current_state: Found three account files with account_manager Thomas Graf; must read each matching file to extract authoritative account names.
next_step.observation: Search in /accounts for "Thomas Graf" returned 3 matching files: acct_002, acct_005, acct_008.

next_step.current_state: Got first account name. Need read remaining two matches for complete validated list.
next_step.observation: accounts/acct_002.json shows name "Acme Robotics" with account_manager "Thomas Graf".

next_step.current_state: Two of three account names collected; one remaining file to confirm full list.
next_step.observation: accounts/acct_005.json shows name "GreenGrid Energy" with account_manager "Thomas Graf".

next_step.current_state: Collected all matching accounts and extracted names; ready to return final result.
next_step.observation: accounts/acct_008.json confirms third account managed by Thomas Graf: Helios Tax Group.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.md, context) and used read/search-only workflow.
function.outcome_justification: Resolved Graf Thomas to canonical record Thomas Graf (contacts/mgr_002.json), searched accounts for that manager name, then read all three matching account files to extract and alphabetize account names.
